title: #winning Air Shot Hovering Ball Foam Dart One Player Skill Shooting Blaster Game
features: Battery Powered Hovering Ball Air Flow Skill Game with One Foam Dart Gun and Six Specialised Foam Darts
A Fun Challenge Game of Skill to Shoot the Five Foam Balls Off the Air Streams Using the Foam Dart Guns!
Increase the Challenge by Adjusting the Flow Rate Valve on Each Tower to Make the Balls Move Even More
An Ideal Gift that for Older Kids, Families, Parties, and Foam Dart fans who Love Fun Fast Paced Challenges
Base Unit Measures Around 32 cm by 26 cm by 5 cm | Requires 4 x 1.5v "C" Cell Sized Batteries (Not Included)
Some Minimal Assembly Required | Adult Supervision Recommended for Children | Recommended for Ages 8+
description: Product description Introducing the #winning Air Shot Hovering Ball Foam Dart Game, a battery-powered skill challenge featuring two foam dart guns and six specialized foam darts. Watch as the hovering ball streams through the air, ready for a fast-paced, interactive battle that tests your aim, coordination and reflexes. Engage in an exciting duel where the first player to shoot five foam balls off the air streams wins! Adjust the flow rate valve on each tower to ramp up the challenge and test your precision. This innovative, electronic arcade action game delivers interactive multiplayer battles that keep everyone on their toes. Perfect for older kids, families, and party enthusiasts, this compact and durable game offers endless fun and competitive excitement. With minimal assembly required and a design that promotes coordination and skill, it’s an ideal present for any occasion. Arriving in full-colour gift packaging, it’s ready to impress. Safety Warning CAUTION - Do not aim at eyes or face. To avoid injury, use only darts supplied with this product. Do not modify blaster or darts in any way. WARNING: Choking Hazard - Small Parts. Not For Children Under 3 Years.
